basic_details.job_title: TIFR Clerk Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 10 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Tata Institute of Fundamental Research (TIFR) has published the Clerk Trainee Recruitment 2026 notification (Advt. No. 2026/10) for 10 Clerk Trainee positions. Candidates with a Graduate degree and aged not exceeding 28 years are eligible to attend the walk-in selection process. Interested applicants can appear directly at the official venue through the TIFR recruitment portal at https://www.tifr.res.in. The selection process will be conducted via walk-in interview on 10 July 2026, and candidates can refer to the official notification for complete details.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 28 years Age relaxation as per rules.

qualification.details: Graduate from a recognized University / Institute. Knowledge of typing and use of personal computers and applications. Candidates with experience in Microsoft Excel and good drafting skills will be preferred.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download TIFR Clerk Trainee Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TIFR Clerk Trainee position?
faq.answer: The application process is through a walk-in selection. The walk-in date for the Clerk Trainee position is 10th July 2026. Candidates should report to the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Clerk Trainee post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be graduates from a recognized University or Institute. Knowledge of typing and proficiency in using personal computers and applications are also essential.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Clerk Trainee position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Clerk Trainee position is not exceeding 28 years as of the closing date for receipt of applications. Age relaxation will be provided as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Clerk Trainee role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Clerk Trainee position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 22,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Clerk Trainee post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 10 vacancies announced for the Clerk Trainee position at TIFR.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the TIFR Clerk Trainee recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Clerk Trainee position will involve a Written Test followed by a Skill Test. Candidates need to qualify in both stages.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the TIFR Clerk Trainee recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for the Clerk Trainee position. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates bring for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must bring original documents such as a printout of the online application form, recent passport-size photograph, Identity Proof (Aadhaar Card, Election Card, PAN Card, Passport, Driving License), and copies of these documents.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for the Clerk Trainee position?
faq.answer: The Clerk Trainee position at TIFR is a temporary job role. This means the employment is for a fixed duration.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in selection for the TIFR Clerk Trainee position being held?
faq.answer: The walk-in selection will be held at Tata Institute of Fundamental Research (TIFR), Mumbai, Maharashtra, with the pincode 400005.
